text: The ID will present the components concept.
He will also check into the importance and possibility of using rechargeable batteries and a charger.
The UI will present the user interface concept.
He will also draw some ideas for the shape of the remote.
The marketing expert will need to find information on current trends and see into the financial issues concerning the integration of a charger.
The team will also examine whether they can use an LCD and/or speech recognition.
Finally, they will try to think of a name for their product.
